Theorem csbeq12dv 3861
Description: Formula-building inference for class substitution. (Contributed by SN, 3-Nov-2023.)
Hypotheses
Ref Expression
csbeq12dv.1 ⊢ (𝜑 → 𝐴 = 𝐶)
csbeq12dv.2 ⊢ (𝜑 → 𝐵 = 𝐷)
Assertion
Ref Expression
csbeq12dv ⊢ (𝜑 → ⦋𝐴 / 𝑥⦌𝐵 = ⦋𝐶 / 𝑥⦌𝐷)
Distinct variable group:   𝜑,𝑥
Allowed substitution hints:   𝐴(𝑥)   𝐵(𝑥)   𝐶(𝑥)   𝐷(𝑥)
Proof of Theorem csbeq12dv
StepHypRef Expression
1 csbeq12dv.1 . . 3 ⊢ (𝜑 → 𝐴 = 𝐶)
21csbeq1d 3856 . 2 ⊢ (𝜑 → ⦋𝐴 / 𝑥⦌𝐵 = ⦋𝐶 / 𝑥⦌𝐵)
3 csbeq12dv.2 . . 3 ⊢ (𝜑 → 𝐵 = 𝐷)
43csbeq2dv 3859 . 2 ⊢ (𝜑 → ⦋𝐶 / 𝑥⦌𝐵 = ⦋𝐶 / 𝑥⦌𝐷)
52, 4eqtrd 2797 1 ⊢ (𝜑 → ⦋𝐴 / 𝑥⦌𝐵 = ⦋𝐶 / 𝑥⦌𝐷)
Colors of variables: wff setvar class
Syntax hints:   → wi 4   = wceq 1560  ⦋csb 3852
